name: Bud Financial
description: Open-banking data intelligence API (transaction enrichment, categorization).

seo.title: Bud Financial — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Bud Financial: Open-banking data intelligence API (transaction enrichment, categorization).

when_to_use: Transaction categorization and enrichment for personal finance apps
Open banking data API for creditworthiness assessment in lending
Spending insights and budget analytics powered by bank data
Account aggregation for B2B expense management products

review.verdict: Data intelligence layer, not a gateway — useful on top of open banking but won't process payments directly.
review.best_for: UK fintechs and banks enriching transaction data for product features
review.not_for: Teams looking for payment acceptance or card acquiring

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
